requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Safety — Blue Light Hazard (GSO IEC 62471 Risk Groups)
requirement_topic.zh: 光生物安全——蓝光危害（GSO IEC 62471 危险组别）
requirement_topic.zht: 光生物安全——藍光危害（GSO IEC 62471 危險組別）

summary.en: Photobiological safety of LED lamps and luminaires for the Bahrain market is assessed against the GSO adoption of IEC 62471 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), which classifies products into risk groups from RG0 (Exempt — no hazard) to RG3 (High risk) based on blue-light-weighted radiance and irradiance. Where BSMD treats the lighting product as regulated, a defensible risk-group assessment forms part of the technical documentation, and RG2 or higher products carry usage warnings and labelling obligations. The assessment is conducted on the product as operated on the Bahrain 230 V, 50 Hz supply, normally evidenced by a test report from an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory.
summary.zh: 面向巴林市场的 LED 灯和灯具的光生物安全按 GSO 采纳的 IEC 62471（灯和灯系统的光生物安全）评估，依据蓝光加权辐亮度和辐照度将产品分为从 RG0（豁免——无危害）至 RG3（高危险）的危险组别。在 BSMD 将该照明产品视为受管制产品时，可辩护的危险组别评估并入技术文件，RG2 及以上产品须附带使用警告及标签义务。评估在产品按巴林 230 V、50 Hz 电源运行的条件下进行，通常以 ILAC MRA 认可实验室出具的检测报告作为证据。
summary.zht: 面向巴林市場的 LED 燈和燈具的光生物安全按 GSO 採納的 IEC 62471（燈和燈系統的光生物安全）評估，依據藍光加權輻亮度和輻照度將產品分為從 RG0（豁免——無危害）至 RG3（高危險）的危險組別。在 BSMD 將該照明產品視為受管制產品時，可辯護的危險組別評估並入技術文件，RG2 及以上產品須附帶使用警告及標籤義務。評估在產品按巴林 230 V、50 Hz 電源運行的條件下進行，通常以 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室出具的檢測報告作為證據。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (GSO adoption of IEC 62471; risk group classification)
BSMD (MOIC) — technical documentation for regulated lighting products

summary.en: China has adopted GB/T 20145-2006 (Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems), technically equivalent to IEC 62471:2006. GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is not universally mandatory for all LED luminaires in the Chinese market; enforcement and testing obligations for residential luminaires are less prescriptive. Chinese GB/T 20145 reports are not automatically accepted for Bahrain BSMD market access.
summary.zh: 中国已采用 GB/T 20145-2006（灯和灯系统的光生物安全），技术上等同于 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），并非对所有中国市场 LED 灯具均为强制要求；对居民灯具的执行及检测义务规定不够严格。中国 GB/T 20145 报告不自动被巴林 BSMD 市场准入所接受。
summary.zht: 中國已採用 GB/T 20145-2006（燈和燈系統的光生物安全），技術上等同於 IEC 62471:2006。GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），並非對所有中國市場 LED 燈具均為強制要求；對居民燈具的執行及檢測義務規定不夠嚴格。中國 GB/T 20145 報告不自動被巴林 BSMD 市場准入所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard)

gap.en: GSO IEC 62471 (Bahrain) and GB/T 20145 (China) share the IEC 62471 technical base, so the classification method is largely common. Key gaps: (1) China's GB/T 20145 is a recommended standard not routinely enforced for residential LED luminaires, so a CN-market file may lack a documented risk-group assessment; (2) where BSMD treats the product as regulated, the exporter should provide a defensible risk-group classification from an ILAC MRA-recognised laboratory referencing the GSO/IEC edition accepted by BSMD; (3) RG2/RG3 products carry usage warnings and labelling that must be present on Bahrain-market packaging; (4) testing should reflect operation at 230 V, 50 Hz. Confirm with BSMD/the in-country importer whether a 62471 risk-group declaration is required for the specific product category.
gap.zh: 巴林 GSO IEC 62471 与中国 GB/T 20145 同以 IEC 62471 为技术基础，分类方法基本一致。主要差距：（1）中国 GB/T 20145 为推荐性标准，对居民 LED 灯具的日常执行有限，故中国市场文件可能缺少已记录的危险组别评估；（2）在 BSMD 将产品视为受管制时，出口商应提供来自 ILAC MRA 认可实验室、引用 BSMD 接受的 GSO/IEC 版本的可辩护危险组别分类；（3）RG2/RG3 产品须附带使用警告及标签，且须出现在巴林市场包装上；（4）检测应反映 230 V、50 Hz 运行。请向 BSMD/当地进口商确认具体产品类别是否要求 62471 危险组别声明。
gap.zht: 巴林 GSO IEC 62471 與中國 GB/T 20145 同以 IEC 62471 為技術基礎，分類方法基本一致。主要差距：（1）中國 GB/T 20145 為推薦性標準，對居民 LED 燈具的日常執行有限，故中國市場文件可能缺少已記錄的危險組別評估；（2）在 BSMD 將產品視為受管制時，出口商應提供來自 ILAC MRA 認可實驗室、引用 BSMD 接受的 GSO/IEC 版本的可辯護危險組別分類；（3）RG2/RG3 產品須附帶使用警告及標籤，且須出現在巴林市場包裝上；（4）檢測應反映 230 V、50 Hz 運行。請向 BSMD/當地進口商確認具體產品類別是否要求 62471 危險組別聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — photobiological risk-group assessment to GSO IEC 62471 expected for regulated lighting products under BSMD; RG2/RG3 require usage warnings and labelling
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 20145-2006 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; enforcement for residential luminaires is not universally prescribed

source.publisher: GCC Standardization Organization (GSO) — adopted by Bahrain via BSMD/MOIC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Photobiological risk-group classification for Bahrain is assessed against GSO IEC 62471, with a defensible assessment forming part of the BSMD technical documentation for regulated lighting products. The method is largely harmonized with China's GB/T 20145, which is recommended-only — so a CN-market file may lack a documented classification. RG2/RG3 products require usage warnings and labelling on Bahrain-market packaging. Confirm with BSMD whether a 62471 declaration is required for the specific product category.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林光生物危险组别分类按 GSO IEC 62471 评估，可辩护的评估并入受管制照明产品的 BSMD 技术文件。该方法与中国 GB/T 20145 基本协调，而后者仅为推荐性标准——故中国市场文件可能缺少已记录的分类。RG2/RG3 产品须在巴林市场包装上附带使用警告及标签。提交前请向 BSMD 确认具体产品类别是否要求 62471 声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林光生物危險組別分類按 GSO IEC 62471 評估，可辯護的評估並入受管制照明產品的 BSMD 技術文件。該方法與中國 GB/T 20145 基本協調，而後者僅為推薦性標準——故中國市場文件可能缺少已記錄的分類。RG2/RG3 產品須在巴林市場包裝上附帶使用警告及標籤。提交前請向 BSMD 確認具體產品類別是否要求 62471 聲明。

requirement_topic.en: Photobiological Risk Labelling and Marking on Bahrain-Market Packaging
requirement_topic.zh: 巴林市场包装上的光生物危险标签与标记
requirement_topic.zht: 巴林市場包裝上的光生物危險標籤與標記

summary.en: For LED lighting products classified above the exempt group under GSO IEC 62471, the safety marking and user-information provisions of the GSO/IEC lighting and lamp standards apply: RG2 (moderate risk) and RG3 (high risk) products must carry the relevant photobiological hazard warning and usage instructions, and the marking must appear on the product or packaging supplied into Bahrain. Unlike the EU energy-label regime, Bahrain does not mandate a standalone plain-language blue-light class field on a separate energy label; instead the photobiological warning derives from the product-safety standards and the manufacturer's risk-group declaration held in the BSMD technical file. Markings and instructions should be in a form acceptable to BSMD/MOIC (Arabic and/or English per import requirements).
summary.zh: 对于按 GSO IEC 62471 分类高于豁免组别的 LED 照明产品，适用 GSO/IEC 照明及灯标准的安全标记和用户信息条款：RG2（中等危险）和 RG3（高危险）产品须附带相关光生物危害警告及使用说明，且标记须出现在供应巴林的产品或包装上。与欧盟能效标签制度不同，巴林不强制要求在单独能效标签上设置独立的通俗语言蓝光等级栏；光生物警告源自产品安全标准及 BSMD 技术文件中所持的制造商危险组别声明。标记和说明应采用 BSMD/MOIC 可接受的形式（按进口要求采用阿拉伯语和/或英语）。
summary.zht: 對於按 GSO IEC 62471 分類高於豁免組別的 LED 照明產品，適用 GSO/IEC 照明及燈標準的安全標記和用戶信息條款：RG2（中等危險）和 RG3（高危險）產品須附帶相關光生物危害警告及使用說明，且標記須出現在供應巴林的產品或包裝上。與歐盟能效標籤制度不同，巴林不強制要求在單獨能效標籤上設置獨立的通俗語言藍光等級欄；光生物警告源自產品安全標準及 BSMD 技術文件中所持的製造商危險組別聲明。標記和說明應採用 BSMD/MOIC 可接受的形式（按進口要求採用阿拉伯語和/或英語）。

standards_or_laws: GSO IEC 62471 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (marking and user-information provisions for RG2/RG3)
BSMD (MOIC) — product marking and labelling requirements at import (Arabic and/or English)

summary.en: China's GB/T 20145-2006 contains photobiological marking guidance aligned with IEC 62471, but as a recommended standard it is not routinely enforced for residential luminaires, and the China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255 does not include a blue-light hazard field. Chinese-market packaging therefore typically does not carry a dedicated photobiological hazard marking unless the product category specifically calls for it. There is no Chinese requirement to present the marking in Arabic.
summary.zh: 中国 GB/T 20145-2006 包含与 IEC 62471 对齐的光生物标记指引，但作为推荐性标准，对居民灯具的日常执行有限，且 GB 30255 下的中国能效标识（CEL）不含蓝光危害栏。因此中国市场包装通常不附带专门的光生物危害标记，除非具体产品类别明确要求。中国无以阿拉伯语呈现标记的要求。
summary.zht: 中國 GB/T 20145-2006 包含與 IEC 62471 對齊的光生物標記指引，但作為推薦性標準，對居民燈具的日常執行有限，且 GB 30255 下的中國能效標識（CEL）不含藍光危害欄。因此中國市場包裝通常不附帶專門的光生物危害標記，除非具體產品類別明確要求。中國無以阿拉伯語呈現標記的要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20145-2006 — Photobiological safety of lamps and lamp systems (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard; marking guidance)
GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (no blue-light hazard field on China Energy Label)

gap.en: The exporter gap is primarily a marking/labelling and language gap rather than a different test method. (1) Bahrain expects RG2/RG3 photobiological warnings and usage instructions on the product/packaging per the GSO/IEC marking provisions, whereas CN-market packaging often omits a dedicated photobiological marking; (2) Bahrain import marking/labelling may need to be in Arabic and/or English, unlike Chinese-only CN packaging; (3) there is no separate Bahrain blue-light-class energy-label field (so the EU-style plain-language class is not the mechanism here) — the obligation flows from the product-safety risk-group classification held in the BSMD technical file. Exporters should add the appropriate hazard marking and instructions in the BSMD-acceptable language and retain the underlying GSO IEC 62471 classification report.
gap.zh: 出口商差距主要为标记/标签及语言差距，而非检测方法不同。（1）巴林要求按 GSO/IEC 标记条款在产品/包装上附带 RG2/RG3 光生物警告及使用说明，而中国市场包装常省略专门的光生物标记；（2）巴林进口标记/标签可能须采用阿拉伯语和/或英语，不同于仅中文的中国包装；（3）巴林无单独的蓝光等级能效标签栏（故欧盟式通俗语言等级并非此处机制）——义务源自 BSMD 技术文件中所持的产品安全危险组别分类。出口商应以 BSMD 可接受的语言添加适当的危害标记和说明，并保留底层 GSO IEC 62471 分类报告。
gap.zht: 出口商差距主要為標記/標籤及語言差距，而非檢測方法不同。（1）巴林要求按 GSO/IEC 標記條款在產品/包裝上附帶 RG2/RG3 光生物警告及使用說明，而中國市場包裝常省略專門的光生物標記；（2）巴林進口標記/標籤可能須採用阿拉伯語和/或英語，不同於僅中文的中國包裝；（3）巴林無單獨的藍光等級能效標籤欄（故歐盟式通俗語言等級並非此處機制）——義務源自 BSMD 技術文件中所持的產品安全危險組別分類。出口商應以 BSMD 可接受的語言添加適當的危害標記和說明，並保留底層 GSO IEC 62471 分類報告。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — RG2/RG3 photobiological hazard marking and usage instructions required on Bahrain-market product/packaging per GSO/IEC marking provisions; Arabic and/or English per BSMD import requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Not generally required — Chinese-market packaging usually omits a dedicated photobiological hazard marking; China Energy Label (GB 30255) has no blue-light hazard field

source.publisher: Ministry of Industry and Commerce (MOIC) — Bahrain Standards and Metrology Directorate (BSMD)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bahrain photobiological labelling flows from the GSO/IEC 62471 product-safety marking provisions rather than a separate blue-light energy-label field as in the EU. RG2/RG3 products require hazard warnings and usage instructions on the product/packaging, potentially in Arabic and/or English per BSMD import requirements. Chinese-market packaging usually omits this marking, so exporters should add it and retain the underlying GSO IEC 62471 risk-group classification report in the BSMD technical file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林光生物标签源自 GSO/IEC 62471 产品安全标记条款，而非欧盟式单独的蓝光能效标签栏。RG2/RG3 产品须在产品/包装上附带危害警告及使用说明，并可能按 BSMD 进口要求采用阿拉伯语和/或英语。中国市场包装通常省略该标记，故出口商应予添加，并在 BSMD 技术文件中保留底层 GSO IEC 62471 危险组别分类报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林光生物標籤源自 GSO/IEC 62471 產品安全標記條款，而非歐盟式單獨的藍光能效標籤欄。RG2/RG3 產品須在產品/包裝上附帶危害警告及使用說明，並可能按 BSMD 進口要求採用阿拉伯語和/或英語。中國市場包裝通常省略該標記，故出口商應予添加，並在 BSMD 技術文件中保留底層 GSO IEC 62471 危險組別分類報告。
